nodes.name: 解析九宫格分镜并生成grid_prompt
组装九宫格生图请求体

parts.text:
{
  "content_type": "剧情故事",
  "style_mode": "anime",
  "style_anchor": "preserved original visual style from reference image",
  "visual_anchor": {
    "subject_identity": "A handsome young man with long, flowing white hair tied in a topknot, sharp features, and a calm demeanor. He is an ancient Chinese martial artist.",
    "outfit_anchor": "A flowing white robe with black and grey underlayers, a black sash, and dark bracers. The style is elegant and traditional.",
    "product_anchor": "N/A",
    "scene_anchor": "An open-air stone courtyard of an ancient Chinese temple, with traditional architecture in the background, set against a misty, mountainous landscape."
  },
  "global_style": "anime illustration, 2D cel shading, clean lineart, stylized composition, preserve original anime aesthetic, no text, no UI",
  "negative_prompts": [
    "real human skin texture",
    "photorealistic face",
    "live action style",
    "hyper realistic pores",
    "text overlay",
    "watermark",
    "frame border",
    "gridline"
  ],
  "shots": [
    {
      "shot_index": 1,
      "title": "The Standoff",
      "story_beat": "Introduction of the two combatants, establishing the scene and the imminent conflict.",
      "subject": "The white-haired hero and his opponent, a warrior in dark crimson armor.",
      "scene": "Ancient Chinese temple courtyard, misty mountains in the background.",
      "emotion": "Tense, focused, anticipation.",
      "camera_shot": "Wide shot, eye-level, showing both fighters facing each other from a distance.",
      "motion_hint": "A slow camera dolly-in, increasing the tension. Wind blows their hair and clothes.",
      "prompt_text": "A wide shot in an ancient Chinese temple courtyard. On the left, a handsome man with long white hair in white robes stands in a ready stance. On the right, a muscular warrior in ornate dark crimson and black armor faces him. The air crackles with tension. The background features misty mountains and traditional temple roofs. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 2,
      "title": "First Strike",
      "story_beat": "The opponent initiates the duel with a powerful elemental attack.",
      "subject": "The warrior in crimson armor.",
      "scene": "Ancient Chinese temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Aggressive, powerful, determined.",
      "camera_shot": "Medium shot, low angle, focusing on the crimson warrior as he thrusts his palm forward.",
      "motion_hint": "A fast zoom towards the opponent as he launches the attack. Fire particles erupt from his hand.",
      "prompt_text": "A low-angle medium shot of the warrior in crimson armor. He has a fierce expression, thrusting his palm forward, unleashing a massive, swirling fireball. Orange and red energy particles emanate from his hand, illuminating his armor. The stone ground beneath him begins to crack and glow. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 3,
      "title": "Swift Defense",
      "story_beat": "The hero calmly reacts and defends against the incoming attack.",
      "subject": "The white-haired hero.",
      "scene": "Ancient Chinese temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Calm, composed, powerful.",
      "camera_shot": "Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the hero, showing the incoming fireball and his defensive maneuver.",
      "motion_hint": "The hero's hands move in a circular motion, forming a shield that ripples upon impact.",
      "prompt_text": "Over-the-shoulder shot of the white-haired man. He holds his hands up, conjuring a translucent, swirling blue energy shield just as the massive fireball is about to hit. The impact creates a bright flash of light where blue and orange energies meet. His white robes billow from the force. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 4,
      "title": "Counterattack",
      "story_beat": "The hero retaliates with his signature energy attack.",
      "subject": "The white-haired hero.",
      "scene": "Ancient Chinese temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Focused, powerful, controlled.",
      "camera_shot": "Medium shot, side profile, capturing the hero launching his attack.",
      "motion_hint": "The hero pushes his hand forward, and the energy orb shoots across the frame with a trail of light.",
      "prompt_text": "A dynamic side-profile medium shot of the white-haired man, in the exact pose from the reference image. He extends his right hand, launching a swirling sphere of blue energy towards his opponent. A trail of blue light follows the orb. His expression is one of intense focus. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 5,
      "title": "Clash of Powers",
      "story_beat": "The two opposing forces collide, creating a massive explosion.",
      "subject": "The blue energy orb and a newly summoned fire vortex.",
      "scene": "Center of the temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Violent, chaotic, spectacular.",
      "camera_shot": "Wide shot, centered on the point of impact between the two attacks.",
      "motion_hint": "A violent screen shake and a bright flash of light, followed by an expanding shockwave of energy and dust.",
      "prompt_text": "A wide shot focusing on the center of the courtyard. The hero's blue energy sphere collides with a red fire vortex from the opponent, creating a massive explosion of purple and white light. Energy arcs and sparks fly everywhere, and the stone tiles of the ground are shattered and thrown into the air. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 6,
      "title": "The Shockwave",
      "story_beat": "Both combatants brace against the aftermath of the explosion.",
      "subject": "Both fighters, struggling against the blast.",
      "scene": "Temple courtyard, filled with dust and debris.",
      "emotion": "Strained, enduring.",
      "camera_shot": "Dutch angle wide shot, showing both fighters pushed back and bracing themselves.",
      "motion_hint": "Dust and small rocks fly past the camera. The characters' clothes whip around violently.",
      "prompt_text": "A dramatic Dutch angle wide shot. The white-haired hero and the crimson warrior are on opposite sides of the frame, thrown back by the explosion's shockwave. They are digging their feet into the ground to hold their stance, arms raised to shield their faces from the swirling dust and energy. The courtyard is obscured by smoke and debris. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 7,
      "title": "Opponent's Resolve",
      "story_beat": "The opponent, undeterred, prepares a more devastating attack.",
      "subject": "The crimson warrior.",
      "scene": "His side of the ruined courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Furious, determined, immense power.",
      "camera_shot": "Close-up on the crimson warrior's face and upper body.",
      "motion_hint": "Flames intensify around him, swirling upwards. A low camera tremble indicates the immense power being gathered.",
      "prompt_text": "A tight close-up on the crimson warrior's enraged face, seen through a curtain of rising flames. His eyes glow with fiery energy as he gathers power, his hands clenched. Intense flames and streams of lava-like energy swirl around his body, casting a hellish red light on his dark armor. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 8,
      "title": "Hero's Final Stand",
      "story_beat": "The hero gathers his own energy to meet the final challenge.",
      "subject": "The white-haired hero.",
      "scene": "His side of the ruined courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Serene, focused, ultimate concentration.",
      "camera_shot": "Close-up on the hero's face and upper body.",
      "motion_hint": "Blue energy particles converge on him, and his white hair begins to float upwards as he powers up.",
      "prompt_text": "A serene close-up on the white-haired hero's calm and focused face. His eyes are closed for a moment, then snap open, glowing with a brilliant blue light. Bright blue energy particles from the air converge around him, and his long white hair floats weightlessly as a massive aura of swirling blue power forms behind him. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 9,
      "title": "The Final Charge",
      "story_beat": "Both combatants launch themselves at each other for the final, decisive blow.",
      "subject": "Both fighters in mid-air.",
      "scene": "Above the center of the ruined courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Climactic, epic, high-stakes.",
      "camera_shot": "Extreme wide shot, low angle, capturing both figures leaping towards each other.",
      "motion_hint": "A dramatic slow-motion as they approach each other, freezing the frame just before impact.",
      "prompt_text": "An epic, low-angle extreme wide shot. The white-haired hero, wreathed in a spiraling blue aura, and the crimson warrior, cloaked in raging fire, have leaped into the air. They are frozen in time, milliseconds from colliding in the center of the frame, their ultimate attacks ready to be unleashed. The ruined temple courtyard is visible below them. Anime illustration style, cel shading, clean lineart."
    }
  ]
}

body.script: 遇到一个火属性的敌人，双方开展激烈战斗

main.node: 解析九宫格分镜并生成grid_prompt
